{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27726","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27726/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27726/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27726/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27726","id":2645579445,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86dsFa1","number":27726,"title":"BUG: The mask value may be removed in numpy.ma.core.MaskedArray","user":{"login":"A-nkt","id":43740221,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjQzNzQwMjIx","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/43740221?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt","html_url":"https://github.com/A-nkt","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/A-nkt/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-11-09T03:52:51Z","updated_at":"2024-11-09T03:52:51Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

If you overwrite an array defined with numpy.ma.core.MaskedArray with numpy.ndarray, the mask will be removed.
However, this behavior only occurs when the dimensions are different; it does not occur if the dimensions are the same.

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import numpy as np


a3 = np.array([[-9999, 8, -9999], [1, 100, 2], [-9999, -9999, 2]])
a3 = np.ma.masked_where(a3 == -9999, a3) # a3 is masked
b3 = np.array([[-9999, 8, -9999], [1, 100, 2], [-9999, -9999, 2]])
b3 = np.ma.masked_where(b3 == -9999, b3) # b3 is masked

x3 = np.zeros(((2, 3, 3)))
x3[0, :, :] = a3
x3[1, :, :] = b3
print(x3) # x3 is not masked. x3 contains -9999.
```


### Error message:

_No response_

### Python and NumPy Versions:

3.10.6 (main, Aug 10 2022, 12:36:34) [Clang 13.1.6 (clang-1316.0.21.2.5)]

### Runtime Environment:

[{'numpy_version': '2.1.3',
  'python': '3.10.6 (main, Aug 10 2022, 12:36:34) [Clang 13.1.6 '
            '(clang-1316.0.21.2.5)]',

 {'simd_extensions': {'baseline': ['NEON', 'NEON_FP16', 'NEON_VFPV4', 'ASIMD'],
